------WebKitFormBoundary
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="name"

John Doe
------WebKitFormBoundary
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="email"

john@example.com
------WebKitFormBoundary
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="message"

Hello, this is a normal message with regular text content.
------WebKitFormBoundary--
